next_steps: Run maintain to rsync hdc + hdc-private and install cron schedules.
Open http://<guest-ip>:9120 for the web UI (vault HDC_HDC_RUNNER_UI_PASSWORD).
Test a job: ssh hdc@<guest-ip> node /opt/hdc-runner/bin/run-scheduled-job.mjs <schedule-id>
Set configure.ssh.host on the deployment when the guest IP is known.
